'''鈭歨-z-z''' ('''kahazaz''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lurve|lurve]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-z-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lurve|lurve]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歨-z-z
|-
! Lemma
| kahazaz
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihazaz|thihazaz]] || [[word:jihazaz|jihazaz]] || [[word:shihazaz|shihazaz]] || [[word:kihazaz|kihazaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuhazaz|thuthuhazaz]] || [[word:jujuhazaz|jujuhazaz]] || [[word:shushuhazaz|shushuhazaz]] || [[word:kukuhazaz|kukuhazaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuhazaz|thuhazaz]] || [[word:juhazaz|juhazaz]] || [[word:shuhazaz|shuhazaz]] || [[word:kuhazaz|kuhazaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuhazaz|thuhazaz]] || [[word:juhazaz|juhazaz]] || [[word:shuhazaz|shuhazaz]] || [[word:kuhazaz|kuhazaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thehazaz|thehazaz]] || [[word:jehazaz|jehazaz]] || [[word:shehazaz|shehazaz]] || [[word:kehazaz|kehazaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothohazaz|thothohazaz]] || [[word:jojohazaz|jojohazaz]] || [[word:shoshohazaz|shoshohazaz]] || [[word:kokohazaz|kokohazaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thohazaz|thohazaz]] || [[word:johazaz|johazaz]] || [[word:shohazaz|shohazaz]] || [[word:kohazaz|kohazaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thohazaz|thohazaz]] || [[word:johazaz|johazaz]] || [[word:shohazaz|shohazaz]] || [[word:kohazaz|kohazaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙hazaz|th忙hazaz]] || [[word:j忙hazaz|j忙hazaz]] || [[word:sh忙hazaz|sh忙hazaz]] || [[word:k忙hazaz|k忙hazaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathahazaz|thathahazaz]] || [[word:jajahazaz|jajahazaz]] || [[word:shashahazaz|shashahazaz]] || [[word:kakahazaz|kakahazaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thahazaz|thahazaz]] || [[word:jahazaz|jahazaz]] || [[word:shahazaz|shahazaz]] || [[word:kahazaz|kahazaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thahazaz|thahazaz]] || [[word:jahazaz|jahazaz]] || [[word:shahazaz|shahazaz]] || [[word:kahazaz|kahazaz]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shahazaz|shahazaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshahazaz|goshahazaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishahazaz|gokishahazaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shahazazn眉|shahazazn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshahazaznkn眉|goshahazaznkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishahazazn眉|gokishahazazn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shahazazsh毛|shahazazsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshahazaznksh毛|goshahazaznksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishahazazsh毛|gokishahazazsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahazazro|shahazazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahazaznkro|goshahazaznkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahazazro|gokishahazazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shahazazmu|shahazazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahazaznkmu|goshahazaznkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahazazmu|gokishahazazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shahazazsher|shahazazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshahazaznksher|goshahazaznksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishahazazsher|gokishahazazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shahazazng|shahazazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshahazaznkng|goshahazaznkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishahazazng|gokishahazazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shahazazya|shahazazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshahazaznkya|goshahazaznkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishahazazya|gokishahazazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shahazazyam|shahazazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshahazaznkyam|goshahazaznkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishahazazyam|gokishahazazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahazazn眉sh毛|shahazazn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahazaznkn眉sh毛|goshahazaznkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahazazn眉sh毛|gokishahazazn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahazazn眉ro|shahazazn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahazaznkn眉ro|goshahazaznkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahazazn眉ro|gokishahazazn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahazazn眉mu|shahazazn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahazaznkn眉mu|goshahazaznkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahazazn眉mu|gokishahazazn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahazazsh毛n眉|shahazazsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahazaznksh毛n眉|goshahazaznksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahazazsh毛n眉|gokishahazazsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahazazsh毛ro|shahazazsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahazaznksh毛ro|goshahazaznksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahazazsh毛ro|gokishahazazsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahazazsh毛mu|shahazazsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahazaznksh毛mu|goshahazaznksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahazazsh毛mu|gokishahazazsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahazazron眉|shahazazron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahazaznkron眉|goshahazaznkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahazazron眉|gokishahazazron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahazazrosh毛|shahazazrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahazaznkrosh毛|goshahazaznkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahazazrosh毛|gokishahazazrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shahazazromu|shahazazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshahazaznkromu|goshahazaznkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishahazazromu|gokishahazazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shahazazmun眉|shahazazmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshahazaznkmun眉|goshahazaznkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishahazazmun眉|gokishahazazmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shahazazmush毛|shahazazmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshahazaznkmush毛|goshahazaznkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishahazazmush毛|gokishahazazmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shahazazmuro|shahazazmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshahazaznkmuro|goshahazaznkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishahazazmuro|gokishahazazmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
